design_decisions.title: Standalone struct (not OAI-embed)
design_decisions.rationale: OCI Generative AI Inference API uses its own request/response shapes; embedding *OAI would create a misleading type relationship.

design_decisions.title: OCI SDK config from environment only
design_decisions.rationale: OCI SDK reads ~/.oci/config and OCI_* env vars natively; only OCICompartmentID (a SwornAgent-specific param) is stored in ProviderConfig.

design_decisions.title: Mock OCI client via local interface
design_decisions.rationale: OCI SDK generativeaiinference client is a concrete struct like Bedrock's, but unlike Bedrock the OCI SDK does not expose a BaseEndpoint override, so a local interface extraction is needed for test substitution.

design_decisions.title: Cost: optional token counts, return 0.0
design_decisions.rationale: OCI ChatResult Usage field is a pointer — nil when the model doesn't return counts. Return 0.0 when absent, per spec.

design_decisions.title: Region from OCI SDK, not $OCI_REGION override
design_decisions.rationale: OCI SDK honours OCI_CLI_REGION and config-file region natively; no separate $OCI_REGION parsing needed.

violations: Gate 2 — Planned touchpoints mismatch (config.go and provider_test.go modified but not listed in spec.md "Planned touchpoints"; proof.md "Divergence from plan" does not explain them — only covers $OCI_REGION drift). Evidence: spec.md:53-57, git diff --name-only 3d60456432fd6dbfcdfb6248bf084bfe3da9564a..HEAD, proof.md Divergence section.

Gate 3 — Compartment ID validation and test name do not match spec acceptance check (spec says "Verify returns a non-nil error" for missing compartment; implementation errors in NewOCI; test TestOCIVerify_MissingCompartment calls NewOCI directly, not Verify). Evidence: spec.md acceptance checks, oci.go:42-44, oci_test.go:68-72.
